info.english_meaning: to shineto burnto be illustrious to glow

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'agniM na mA maTitaM saM didIpaH' (f॰8.48.6) prajvalaya prakASaya BAsayetyAha
'sandIpte Bavane tu kUpaKananaM pratyudyamaH kIdfSaH' (Bartf॰3.77) sandIpte=dagDe
'kzaRena sarve vihitAH pradIpA vyAdIpayanto DvajinIM tavASu' (BA0 droRa0 16317) vyAdIpayantaH=saviSezaM prakASayantaH
'AdIpakasya stenasya varRasaMkarikasya ca' (BA0 SAM0 8522) AdIpako gfhAdidAhakaH agnidaH
'sostraM tadaBidIpyantamApatantaM SitEH SarEH tastamBe bARajAlena' (hari0 27346).. aBidIpyantam=aBidIpyat aBimuKaM jvalat aBidIpyantamApatantamiti puMsi prayogO duzyataH
